highlights.text: I was looking for more upside today, stating yesterday at 4pm: “My general lean is to defer to the trend.
That tendency is as follows and I call them the two siblings: “Elevator down sell” being the first, and short squeeze being the second.
Last Wednesday we saw a substantial elevator down sell in ES -and for the first time in a month - sold from open to close.
This would mean a squeeze is coming - a large one - but the trick is the short squeeze only occurs when ES puts in my core setup: The Failed Breakdown.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll discuss the setups that produced the squeeze since last Wednesday in detail (its a classic Failed Breakdown).

This sets up 6942, 6947, 6962, 6973 as the next target slate.” Overnight we defended 6925 all night, quick trap below this morning, then we got to work on this today, arriving at 6962 exact almost to set the high of day.

post_title: The Holiday Squeeze In SPX Arrived As Expected. Can It Continue Though? December 24/26 Plan
